headline: International Paper to Close Carrollton South, Texas Packaging Facility
summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC), a leader in sustainable packaging, today announced it will close its Carrollton South packaging facility located in Carrolton, Texas by the end of the third quarter of 2026. The decision is part of the company's ongoing work to align its manufacturing footprint with customer demand and strengthen the long-term competitiveness of its North America packaging business.

headline: International Paper to close Texas box plant
summary: This closure announcement builds on a string of others from the company, the most recent coming less than three weeks ago.
